rewritten_query:
with cs_ui as (
  select cs_item_sk,
         sum(cs_ext_list_price) as sale,
         sum(cr_refunded_cash+cr_reversed_charge+cr_store_credit) as refund
  from catalog_sales,
       catalog_returns
  where cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk
    and cs_order_number = cr_order_number
    and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
  group by cs_item_sk
  having sum(cs_ext_list_price) > 2*sum(cr_refunded_cash+cr_reversed_charge+cr_store_credit)
), 
cross_sales as (
  select i_product_name product_name,
         i_item_sk item_sk,
         s_store_name store_name,
         s_zip store_zip,
         ad1.ca_street_number b_street_number,
         ad1.ca_street_name b_street_name,
         ad1.ca_city b_city,
         ad1.ca_zip b_zip,
         ad2.ca_street_number c_street_number,
         ad2.ca_street_name c_street_name,
         ad2.ca_city c_city,
         ad2.ca_zip c_zip,
         d1.d_year as syear,
         d2.d_year as fsyear,
         d3.d_year s2year,
         count(*) cnt,
         sum(ss_wholesale_cost) s1,
         sum(ss_list_price) s2,
         sum(ss_coupon_amt) s3
  FROM store_sales
       JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
       JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk AND i_current_price between 17 and 27
       JOIN store_returns ON ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
       JOIN cs_ui ON ss_item_sk = cs_ui.cs_item_sk
       JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
       JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
       JOIN customer_demographics cd1 ON ss_cdemo_sk = cd1.cd_demo_sk 
            AND cd1.cd_marital_status in ('D', 'U', 'S')
            AND cd1.cd_education_status in ('College', 'Advanced Degree')
       JOIN customer_demographics cd2 ON c_current_cdemo_sk = cd2.cd_demo_sk
            AND cd2.cd_marital_status in ('D', 'U', 'S')
            AND cd2.cd_education_status in ('College', 'Advanced Degree')
            AND cd1.cd_marital_status <> cd2.cd_marital_status
       JOIN household_demographics hd1 ON ss_hdemo_sk = hd1.hd_demo_sk
       JOIN household_demographics hd2 ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd2.hd_demo_sk
       JOIN income_band ib1 ON hd1.hd_income_band_sk = ib1.ib_income_band_sk
       JOIN income_band ib2 ON hd2.hd_income_band_sk = ib2.ib_income_band_sk
       JOIN customer_address ad1 ON ss_addr_sk = ad1.ca_address_sk
       JOIN customer_address ad2 ON c_current_addr_sk = ad2.ca_address_sk AND ad2.ca_state in ('KS','MN','NV')
       JOIN date_dim d2 ON c_first_sales_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
       JOIN date_dim d3 ON c_first_shipto_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
       JOIN promotion ON ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk 
            AND p_channel_email = 'Y'
            AND p_channel_tv = 'N'
            AND p_channel_radio = 'Y'
  WHERE ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
  group by i_product_name,
           i_item_sk,
           s_store_name,
           s_zip,
           ad1.ca_street_number,
           ad1.ca_street_name,
           ad1.ca_city,
           ad1.ca_zip,
           ad2.ca_street_number,
           ad2.ca_street_name,
           ad2.ca_city,
           ad2.ca_zip,
           d1.d_year,
           d2.d_year,
           d3.d_year
) 
select cs1.product_name,
       cs1.store_name,
       cs1.store_zip,
       cs1.b_street_number,
       cs1.b_street_name,
       cs1.b_city,
       cs1.b_zip,
       cs1.c_street_number,
       cs1.c_street_name,
       cs1.c_city,
       cs1.c_zip,
       cs1.syear,
       cs1.cnt,
       cs1.s1 as s11,
       cs1.s2 as s21,
       cs1.s3 as s31,
       cs2.s1 as s12,
       cs2.s2 as s22,
       cs2.s3 as s32,
       cs2.syear,
       cs2.cnt 
from cross_sales cs1
JOIN cross_sales cs2 ON cs1.item_sk = cs2.item_sk
                      AND cs1.store_name = cs2.store_name
                      AND cs1.store_zip = cs2.store_zip
                      AND cs2.cnt <= cs1.cnt
where cs1.syear = 1998
  and cs2.syear = 1999
order by cs1.product_name,
         cs1.store_name,
         cs2.cnt,
         cs1.s1,
         cs2.s1;

original_query: select  	s_store_name, 	i_item_desc, 	sc.revenue, 	i_current_price, 	i_wholesale_cost, 	i_brand  from store, item,      (select ss_store_sk, avg(revenue) as ave  	from  	    (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk,  		     sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  		from store_sales, date_dim  		where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1215 and 1215+11     and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 22 * 0.01 AND 32 * 0.01  		group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sa  	group by ss_store_sk) sb,      (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  	from store_sales, date_dim  	where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1215 and 1215+11   and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 22 * 0.01 AND 32 * 0.01  	group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sc  where sb.ss_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave and        s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        i_item_sk = sc.ss_item_sk        and i_manager_id BETWEEN 16 and 20        and s_state in ('GA','IL','TX')  order by s_store_name, i_item_desc limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH sales_agg AS (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_sales_price) AS revenue
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1215 AND 1226
      AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 0.22 AND 0.32
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk
)
SELECT s_store_name, i_item_desc, sc.revenue, i_current_price, i_wholesale_cost, i_brand
FROM store
JOIN sales_agg sc ON store.s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk
JOIN item ON sc.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, AVG(revenue) AS ave
    FROM sales_agg
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk
) sb ON sc.ss_store_sk = sb.ss_store_sk
WHERE sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave
  AND item.i_manager_id BETWEEN 16 AND 20
  AND store.s_state IN ('GA','IL','TX')
ORDER BY s_store_name, i_item_desc
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Create a CTE to compute the store and item level revenue once instead of calculating it twice in separate subqueries, eliminating redundant scans and aggregations.
Simplify the calculation of the ratio by using explicit decimals (0.22 AND 0.32) instead of expressions (22 * 0.01 AND 32 * 0.01) for better readability.
Optimize join operations by using the pre-computed aggregations from the CTE, reducing the need for sorting and improving join efficiency.

original_query: select  	s_store_name, 	i_item_desc, 	sc.revenue, 	i_current_price, 	i_wholesale_cost, 	i_brand  from store, item,      (select ss_store_sk, avg(revenue) as ave  	from  	    (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk,  		     sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  		from store_sales, date_dim  		where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1192 and 1192+11     and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 68 * 0.01 AND 78 * 0.01  		group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sa  	group by ss_store_sk) sb,      (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  	from store_sales, date_dim  	where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1192 and 1192+11   and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 68 * 0.01 AND 78 * 0.01  	group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sc  where sb.ss_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave and        s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        i_item_sk = sc.ss_item_sk        and i_manager_id BETWEEN 79 and 83        and s_state in ('IN','NM','VA')  order by s_store_name, i_item_desc limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH store_item_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
        ss_store_sk, 
        ss_item_sk, 
        SUM(ss_sales_price) AS revenue,
        AVG(SUM(ss_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss_store_sk) AS avg_revenue_per_store
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1192 AND 1192 + 11
      AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 0.68 * ss_list_price AND 0.78 * ss_list_price
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk
)
SELECT 
    s.s_store_name,
    i.i_item_desc,
    sir.revenue,
    i.i_current_price,
    i.i_wholesale_cost,
    i.i_brand
FROM store_item_revenue sir
JOIN store s ON sir.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN item i ON sir.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
WHERE sir.revenue <= 0.1 * sir.avg_revenue_per_store
  AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 79 AND 83
  AND s.s_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')
ORDER BY s.s_store_name, i.i_item_desc
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Eliminate redundant subqueries by using a CTE with a window function. The original query calculates the same subquery twice (for sa and sc).
Combine the sb and sc subqueries into a single CTE to avoid a merge join between them.
Replace division with multiplication in the filter condition (ss_sales_price / ss_list_price) which is more computationally expensive.

original_query: select  	s_store_name, 	i_item_desc, 	sc.revenue, 	i_current_price, 	i_wholesale_cost, 	i_brand  from store, item,      (select ss_store_sk, avg(revenue) as ave  	from  	    (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk,  		     sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  		from store_sales, date_dim  		where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1178 and 1178+11     and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 45 * 0.01 AND 55 * 0.01  		group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sa  	group by ss_store_sk) sb,      (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  	from store_sales, date_dim  	where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1178 and 1178+11   and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 45 * 0.01 AND 55 * 0.01  	group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sc  where sb.ss_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave and        s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        i_item_sk = sc.ss_item_sk        and i_manager_id BETWEEN 83 and 87        and s_state in ('IN','MI','WI')  order by s_store_name, i_item_desc limit 100;
rewritten_query:
SELECT s_store_name, i_item_desc, sc.revenue, i_current_price, i_wholesale_cost, i_brand
FROM store
JOIN (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_sales_price) AS revenue,
           AVG(SUM(ss_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss_store_sk) AS avg_revenue
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1178 AND 1189
      AND (ss_sales_price / ss_list_price) BETWEEN 0.45 AND 0.55
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk
) sc ON store.s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk
JOIN item ON item.i_item_sk = sc.ss_item_sk
WHERE sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sc.avg_revenue
  AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 83 AND 87
  AND s_state IN ('IN', 'MI', 'WI')
ORDER BY s_store_name, i_item_desc
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select    cd_gender,   cd_marital_status,   cd_education_status,   count(*) cnt1,   cd_purchase_estimate,   count(*) cnt2,   cd_credit_rating,   count(*) cnt3  from   customer c,customer_address ca,customer_demographics  where   c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk and   ca_state in ('IN','NM','VA') and   cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk   and cd_marital_status in ('W', 'S', 'M')   and cd_education_status in ('Secondary', 'Primary') and   exists (select *           from store_sales,date_dim           where c.c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk and                 ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                 d_year = 2000 and                 d_moy between 9 and 9+2                 and ss_list_price between 5 and 94           ) and    (not exists (select *             from web_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk and                   ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 2000 and                   d_moy between 9 and 9+2                   and ws_list_price between 5 and 94             ) and     not exists (select *             from catalog_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = cs_ship_customer_sk and                   cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 2000 and                   d_moy between 9 and 9+2                   and cs_list_price between 5 and 94)             )  group by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  order by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_range AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2000
      AND d_moy BETWEEN 9 AND 11
),
store_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ss_customer_sk
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_range ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE ss_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94
),
web_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ws_bill_customer_sk
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_range ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE ws_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94
),
catalog_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cs_ship_customer_sk
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_range ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE cs_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94
)
SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt1,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt2,
    cd_credit_rating,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt3
FROM customer c
JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
JOIN store_customers sc ON c.c_customer_sk = sc.ss_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN web_customers wc ON c.c_customer_sk = wc.ws_bill_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN catalog_customers cc ON c.c_customer_sk = cc.cs_ship_customer_sk
WHERE ca.ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')
  AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S', 'M')
  AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', 'Primary')
  AND wc.ws_bill_customer_sk IS NULL
  AND cc.cs_ship_customer_sk IS NULL
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
ORDER BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Created a common CTE for date_dim filtering to avoid scanning the date_dim table three times
Pre-filtered sales data in CTEs to reduce the amount of data processed in the main query
Changed implicit joins to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization potential

original_query: select    cd_gender,   cd_marital_status,   cd_education_status,   count(*) cnt1,   cd_purchase_estimate,   count(*) cnt2,   cd_credit_rating,   count(*) cnt3  from   customer c,customer_address ca,customer_demographics  where   c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk and   ca_state in ('MS','NM','TN') and   cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk   and cd_marital_status in ('W', 'S', 'W')   and cd_education_status in ('College', 'Advanced Degree') and   exists (select *           from store_sales,date_dim           where c.c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk and                 ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                 d_year = 1999 and                 d_moy between 2 and 2+2                 and ss_list_price between 211 and 300           ) and    (not exists (select *             from web_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk and                   ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 1999 and                   d_moy between 2 and 2+2                   and ws_list_price between 211 and 300             ) and     not exists (select *             from catalog_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = cs_ship_customer_sk and                   cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 1999 and                   d_moy between 2 and 2+2                   and cs_list_price between 211 and 300)             )  group by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  order by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_range AS (
  SELECT d_date_sk
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy BETWEEN 2 AND 4
)
SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt1,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt2,
    cd_credit_rating,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt3
FROM customer c
JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state IN ('MS', 'NM', 'TN')
    AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S')
    AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('College', 'Advanced Degree')
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM store_sales ss
        JOIN date_range dr ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk
        WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM web_sales ws
        JOIN date_range dr ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk
        WHERE ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM catalog_sales cs
        JOIN date_range dr ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk
        WHERE cs.cs_ship_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300
    )
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
ORDER BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Remove duplicate value 'W' in cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S', 'W') to cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S')
Create a date_range CTE to avoid scanning date_dim multiple times for the same filter conditions (d_year = 1999 AND d_moy BETWEEN 2 AND 4)
Replace old-style comma joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimizer hints
Use SELECT 1 instead of SELECT * in EXISTS subqueries as only existence matters, not the actual data

original_query: select    cd_gender,   cd_marital_status,   cd_education_status,   count(*) cnt1,   cd_purchase_estimate,   count(*) cnt2,   cd_credit_rating,   count(*) cnt3  from   customer c,customer_address ca,customer_demographics  where   c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk and   ca_state in ('MD','MO','OK') and   cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk   and cd_marital_status in ('W', 'U', 'W')   and cd_education_status in ('Primary', 'Primary') and   exists (select *           from store_sales,date_dim           where c.c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk and                 ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                 d_year = 2002 and                 d_moy between 5 and 5+2                 and ss_list_price between 132 and 221           ) and    (not exists (select *             from web_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk and                   ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 2002 and                   d_moy between 5 and 5+2                   and ws_list_price between 132 and 221             ) and     not exists (select *             from catalog_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = cs_ship_customer_sk and                   cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 2002 and                   d_moy between 5 and 5+2                   and cs_list_price between 132 and 221)             )  group by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  order by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_range AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2002
      AND d_moy BETWEEN 5 AND 7
),
eligible_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.c_customer_sk
    FROM customer c
    JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
    JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_range ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk
    WHERE ca.ca_state IN ('MD', 'MO', 'OK')
      AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'U')
      AND cd.cd_education_status = 'Primary'
      AND ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 132 AND 221
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM web_sales ws
          JOIN date_range ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk
          WHERE c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
            AND ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 132 AND 221
          UNION ALL
          SELECT 1
          FROM catalog_sales cs
          JOIN date_range ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk
          WHERE c.c_customer_sk = cs.cs_ship_customer_sk
            AND cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 132 AND 221
      )
)
SELECT cd_gender,
       cd_marital_status,
       cd_education_status,
       COUNT(*) AS cnt1,
       cd_purchase_estimate,
       COUNT(*) AS cnt2,
       cd_credit_rating,
       COUNT(*) AS cnt3
FROM customer c
JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
WHERE ca.ca_state IN ('MD', 'MO', 'OK')
  AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'U')
  AND cd.cd_education_status = 'Primary'
  AND c.c_customer_sk IN (SELECT c_customer_sk FROM eligible_customers)
GROUP BY cd_gender,
         cd_marital_status,
         cd_education_status,
         cd_purchase_estimate,
         cd_credit_rating
ORDER BY cd_gender,
         cd_marital_status,
         cd_education_status,
         cd_purchase_estimate,
         cd_credit_rating
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Removed duplicate values in IN clauses: 'W' appears twice in marital_status and 'Primary' appears twice in education_status
Combined web_sales and catalog_sales NOT EXISTS checks into a single NOT EXISTS with UNION ALL to reduce redundancy
Created a date_range CTE to avoid scanning date_dim multiple times for the same conditions
Replaced comma-separated tables with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization

original_query: select  i_item_desc       ,w_warehouse_name       ,d1.d_week_seq       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is null then 1 else 0 end) no_promo       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is not null then 1 else 0 end) promo       ,count(*) total_cnt from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'   and d1.d_year = 2001   and cd_marital_status = 'U'   and cd_dep_count between 5 and 7   and i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100 group by i_item_desc,w_warehouse_name,d1.d_week_seq order by total_cnt desc, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d_week_seq limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_dim_2001 AS (
    SELECT * 
    FROM date_dim 
    WHERE d_year = 2001
)
SELECT 
    i_item_desc,
    w_warehouse_name,
    d1.d_week_seq,
    COUNT(*) - COUNT(p_promo_sk) AS no_promo,
    COUNT(p_promo_sk) AS promo,
    COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN item ON (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk)
JOIN customer_demographics ON (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk)
JOIN household_demographics ON (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk)
JOIN date_dim_2001 d1 ON (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk)
JOIN inventory ON (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk)
JOIN warehouse ON (w_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk)
JOIN date_dim d2 ON (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq)
JOIN date_dim d3 ON (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 days')
LEFT JOIN promotion ON (cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk)
WHERE 
    inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity
    AND hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'
    AND cd_marital_status = 'U'
    AND cd_dep_count BETWEEN 5 AND 7
    AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
GROUP BY i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
ORDER BY total_cnt DESC, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Remove the unnecessary LEFT JOIN to catalog_returns as it's not used in the query results
Replace SUM(CASE WHEN...) expressions with more efficient COUNT functions: COUNT(*) - COUNT(p_promo_sk) for no_promo and COUNT(p_promo_sk) for promo
Move the condition d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 days' from the WHERE clause to the JOIN ON clause for earlier filtering

original_query: select  i_item_desc       ,w_warehouse_name       ,d1.d_week_seq       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is null then 1 else 0 end) no_promo       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is not null then 1 else 0 end) promo       ,count(*) total_cnt from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '>10000'   and d1.d_year = 2001   and cd_marital_status = 'W'   and cd_dep_count between 4 and 6   and i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 37 group by i_item_desc,w_warehouse_name,d1.d_week_seq order by total_cnt desc, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d_week_seq limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT cs_item_sk, cs_bill_cdemo_sk, cs_bill_hdemo_sk, cs_sold_date_sk, 
           cs_ship_date_sk, cs_promo_sk, cs_quantity, cs_order_number
    FROM catalog_sales
    WHERE cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 37
),
filtered_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_week_seq
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001
),
filtered_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk, i_item_desc, i_category
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
)
SELECT i_item_desc,
       w_warehouse_name,
       d1.d_week_seq,
       SUM(CASE WHEN p_promo_sk IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) no_promo,
       SUM(CASE WHEN p_promo_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) promo,
       COUNT(*) total_cnt
FROM filtered_sales cs
JOIN filtered_items i ON (i.i_item_sk = cs.cs_item_sk)
JOIN inventory inv ON (cs.cs_item_sk = inv.inv_item_sk)
JOIN warehouse w ON (w.w_warehouse_sk = inv.inv_warehouse_sk)
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON (cs.cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk)
JOIN household_demographics hd ON (cs.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk)
JOIN filtered_dates d1 ON (cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk)
JOIN date_dim d2 ON (inv.inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk)
JOIN date_dim d3 ON (cs.cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk)
LEFT OUTER JOIN promotion p ON (cs.cs_promo_sk = p.p_promo_sk)
WHERE d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq
  AND inv.inv_quantity_on_hand < cs.cs_quantity
  AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 day'
  AND hd.hd_buy_potential = '>10000'
  AND cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
  AND cd.cd_dep_count BETWEEN 4 AND 6
GROUP BY i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
ORDER BY total_cnt DESC, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Remove the unnecessary LEFT OUTER JOIN to catalog_returns as it's not used in the SELECT clause and can inflate the COUNT(*) values incorrectly.

original_query: select  i_item_desc       ,w_warehouse_name       ,d1.d_week_seq       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is null then 1 else 0 end) no_promo       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is not null then 1 else 0 end) promo       ,count(*) total_cnt from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'   and d1.d_year = 2000   and cd_marital_status = 'S'   and cd_dep_count between 6 and 8   and i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 69 AND 89 group by i_item_desc,w_warehouse_name,d1.d_week_seq order by total_cnt desc, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d_week_seq limit 100;
rewritten_query:
select i_item_desc
      ,w_warehouse_name
      ,d1.d_week_seq
      ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is null then 1 else 0 end) no_promo
      ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is not null then 1 else 0 end) promo
      ,count(*) total_cnt
from date_dim d1
join catalog_sales on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk)
join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women'))
join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk AND cd_marital_status = 'S' AND cd_dep_count between 6 and 8)
join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000')
join date_dim d2 on (d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq)
join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk AND inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity)
join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk)
join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day')
left join promotion on (cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk)
where d1.d_year = 2000
  and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 69 AND 89
group by i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
order by total_cnt desc, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
limit 100;

original_query: select min(i_item_sk)       ,min(w_warehouse_name)       ,min(d1.d_week_seq)       ,min(cs_item_sk)       ,min(cs_order_number)       ,min(inv_item_sk) from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'   and d1.d_year = 2001   and cd_marital_status = 'U'   and cd_dep_count between 5 and 7   and i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100  ;

JOIN date_dim d3 ON (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 days')

    i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100;

original_query: select min(i_item_sk)       ,min(w_warehouse_name)       ,min(d1.d_week_seq)       ,min(cs_item_sk)       ,min(cs_order_number)       ,min(inv_item_sk) from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'   and d1.d_year = 2000   and cd_marital_status = 'S'   and cd_dep_count between 6 and 8   and i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 69 AND 89  ;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_week_seq
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2000
),
filtered_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')
),
filtered_demographics AS (
    SELECT cd_demo_sk
    FROM customer_demographics
    WHERE cd_marital_status = 'S'
    AND cd_dep_count BETWEEN 6 AND 8
),
filtered_household AS (
    SELECT hd_demo_sk
    FROM household_demographics
    WHERE hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'
)
SELECT 
    MIN(i_item_sk),
    MIN(w_warehouse_name),
    MIN(d1.d_week_seq),
    MIN(cs_item_sk),
    MIN(cs_order_number),
    MIN(inv_item_sk)
FROM 
    filtered_dates d1
JOIN catalog_sales ON (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk)
JOIN filtered_items ON (cs_item_sk = i_item_sk)
JOIN filtered_demographics ON (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk)
JOIN filtered_household ON (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk)
JOIN inventory ON (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk)
JOIN date_dim d2 ON (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq)
JOIN warehouse ON (w_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk)
JOIN date_dim d3 ON (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk)
WHERE 
    inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity
    AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 day'
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 69 AND 89;

original_query: WITH all_sales AS (  SELECT d_year        ,i_brand_id        ,i_class_id        ,i_category_id        ,i_manufact_id        ,SUM(sales_cnt) AS sales_cnt        ,SUM(sales_amt) AS sales_amt  FROM (SELECT d_year              ,i_brand_id              ,i_class_id              ,i_category_id              ,i_manufact_id              ,cs_quantity - COALESCE(cr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,cs_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(cr_return_amount,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM catalog_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=cs_item_sk                           JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=cs_sold_date_sk                           LEFT JOIN catalog_returns ON (cs_order_number=cr_order_number                                                     AND cs_item_sk=cr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Sports'        and cs_sales_price / cs_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01        and cr_reason_sk in (7, 10, 12, 29, 45)        UNION        SELECT d_year              ,i_brand_id              ,i_class_id              ,i_category_id              ,i_manufact_id              ,ss_quantity - COALESCE(sr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,ss_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(sr_return_amt,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM store_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=ss_item_sk                         JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=ss_sold_date_sk                         LEFT JOIN store_returns ON (ss_ticket_number=sr_ticket_number                                                 AND ss_item_sk=sr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Sports'        and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01        and sr_reason_sk in (7, 10, 12, 29, 45)        UNION        SELECT d_year              ,i_brand_id              ,i_class_id              ,i_category_id              ,i_manufact_id              ,ws_quantity - COALESCE(wr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,ws_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(wr_return_amt,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM web_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=ws_item_sk                       JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=ws_sold_date_sk                       LEFT JOIN web_returns ON (ws_order_number=wr_order_number                                             AND ws_item_sk=wr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Sports'        and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01        and wr_reason_sk in (7, 10, 12, 29, 45)) sales_detail GROUP BY d_year, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id, i_manufact_id)  SELECT  prev_yr.d_year AS prev_year                           ,curr_yr.d_year AS year                           ,curr_yr.i_brand_id                           ,curr_yr.i_class_id                           ,curr_yr.i_category_id                           ,curr_yr.i_manufact_id                           ,prev_yr.sales_cnt AS prev_yr_cnt                           ,curr_yr.sales_cnt AS curr_yr_cnt                           ,curr_yr.sales_cnt-prev_yr.sales_cnt AS sales_cnt_diff                           ,curr_yr.sales_amt-prev_yr.sales_amt AS sales_amt_diff  FROM all_sales curr_yr, all_sales prev_yr  WHERE curr_yr.i_brand_id=prev_yr.i_brand_id    AND curr_yr.i_class_id=prev_yr.i_class_id    AND curr_yr.i_category_id=prev_yr.i_category_id    AND curr_yr.i_manufact_id=prev_yr.i_manufact_id    AND curr_yr.d_year=1999    AND prev_yr.d_year=1999-1    AND prev_yr.sales_cnt > 0    AND CAST(curr_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))/CAST(prev_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))<0.9  ORDER BY sales_cnt_diff,sales_amt_diff  limit 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Created a filtered_item CTE to pre-filter the item table once instead of repeating the filter in each UNION branch
Changed LEFT JOINs with returns tables to INNER JOINs since the WHERE clauses on reason_sk effectively make them inner joins
Replaced UNION with UNION ALL to avoid duplicate removal overhead since the data from each sales table is distinct
Replaced division operations in price ratio checks with multiplication for better performance
Simplified the final condition by replacing CAST(curr_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))/CAST(prev_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))<0.9 with curr_yr.sales_cnt < 0.9 * prev_yr.sales_cnt
Changed the comma join syntax to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization

COALESCE(sr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,ss_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(sr_return_amt,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM store_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=ss_item_sk                         JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=ss_sold_date_sk                         LEFT JOIN store_returns ON (ss_ticket_number=sr_ticket_number                                                 AND ss_item_sk=sr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Sports'        and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 77 * 0.01 AND 97 * 0.01        and sr_reason_sk in (59, 63, 65, 68, 70)        UNION        SELECT d_year              ,i_brand_id              ,i_class_id              ,i_category_id              ,i_manufact_id              ,ws_quantity - COALESCE(wr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,ws_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(wr_return_amt,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM web_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=ws_item_sk                       JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=ws_sold_date_sk                       LEFT JOIN web_returns ON (ws_order_number=wr_order_number                                             AND ws_item_sk=wr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Sports'        and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 77 * 0.01 AND 97 * 0.01        and wr_reason_sk in (59, 63, 65, 68, 70)) sales_detail GROUP BY d_year, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id, i_manufact_id)  SELECT  prev_yr.d_year AS prev_year                           ,curr_yr.d_year AS year                           ,curr_yr.i_brand_id                           ,curr_yr.i_class_id                           ,curr_yr.i_category_id                           ,curr_yr.i_manufact_id                           ,prev_yr.sales_cnt AS prev_yr_cnt                           ,curr_yr.sales_cnt AS curr_yr_cnt                           ,curr_yr.sales_cnt-prev_yr.sales_cnt AS sales_cnt_diff                           ,curr_yr.sales_amt-prev_yr.sales_amt AS sales_amt_diff  FROM all_sales curr_yr, all_sales prev_yr  WHERE curr_yr.i_brand_id=prev_yr.i_brand_id    AND curr_yr.i_class_id=prev_yr.i_class_id    AND curr_yr.i_category_id=prev_yr.i_category_id    AND curr_yr.i_manufact_id=prev_yr.i_manufact_id    AND curr_yr.d_year=1999    AND prev_yr.d_year=1999-1    AND prev_yr.sales_cnt > 0    AND CAST(curr_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))/CAST(prev_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))<0.9  ORDER BY sales_cnt_diff,sales_amt_diff  limit 100;

original_query: with ssr as  (select  s_store_id as store_id,           sum(ss_ext_sales_price) as sales,           sum(coalesce(sr_return_amt, 0)) as returns,           sum(ss_net_profit - coalesce(sr_net_loss, 0)) as profit   from store_sales left outer join store_returns on          (ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number),      date_dim,      store,      item,      promotion  where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk        and d_date between cast('2001-08-11' as date)                   and cast('2001-08-11' as date) + interval '30' day        and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk        and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk        and i_current_price > 50        and ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk        and p_channel_email = 'N'        and p_channel_tv = 'N'        and p_channel_radio = 'Y'        and p_channel_press = 'N'        and p_channel_event = 'Y'        and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60        and i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Sports')  group by s_store_id)  ,  csr as  (select  cp_catalog_page_id as catalog_page_id,           sum(cs_ext_sales_price) as sales,           sum(coalesce(cr_return_amount, 0)) as returns,           sum(cs_net_profit - coalesce(cr_net_loss, 0)) as profit   from catalog_sales left outer join catalog_returns on          (cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk and cs_order_number = cr_order_number),      date_dim,      catalog_page,      item,      promotion  where cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk        and d_date between cast('2001-08-11' as date)                   and cast('2001-08-11' as date) + interval '30' day         and cs_catalog_page_sk = cp_catalog_page_sk        and cs_item_sk = i_item_sk        and i_current_price > 50        and cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk        and p_channel_email = 'N'        and p_channel_tv = 'N'        and p_channel_radio = 'Y'        and p_channel_press = 'N'        and p_channel_event = 'Y'        and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60        and i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Sports') group by cp_catalog_page_id)  ,  wsr as  (select  web_site_id,           sum(ws_ext_sales_price) as sales,           sum(coalesce(wr_return_amt, 0)) as returns,           sum(ws_net_profit - coalesce(wr_net_loss, 0)) as profit   from web_sales left outer join web_returns on          (ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk and ws_order_number = wr_order_number),      date_dim,      web_site,      item,      promotion  where ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk        and d_date between cast('2001-08-11' as date)                   and cast('2001-08-11' as date) + interval '30' day         and ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk        and ws_item_sk = i_item_sk        and i_current_price > 50        and ws_promo_sk = p_promo_sk        and p_channel_email = 'N'        and p_channel_tv = 'N'        and p_channel_radio = 'Y'        and p_channel_press = 'N'        and p_channel_event = 'Y'        and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60        and i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Sports') group by web_site_id)   select  channel         , id         , sum(sales) as sales         , sum(returns) as returns         , sum(profit) as profit  from  (select 'store channel' as channel         , 'store' || store_id as id         , sales         , returns         , profit  from   ssr  union all  select 'catalog channel' as channel         , 'catalog_page' || catalog_page_id as id         , sales         , returns         , profit  from  csr  union all  select 'web channel' as channel         , 'web_site' || web_site_id as id         , sales         , returns         , profit  from   wsr  ) x  group by rollup (channel, id)  order by channel          ,id  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH promo AS (
  SELECT p_promo_sk
  FROM promotion
  WHERE p_channel_email = 'N'
    AND p_channel_tv = 'N'
    AND p_channel_radio = 'Y'
    AND p_channel_press = 'N'
    AND p_channel_event = 'Y'
), filtered_items AS (
  SELECT i_item_sk
  FROM item
  WHERE i_current_price > 50
    AND i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Sports')
), date_range AS (
  SELECT d_date_sk
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_date BETWEEN CAST('2001-08-11' AS DATE) 
                   AND CAST('2001-08-11' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '30' DAY
), ssr AS (
  SELECT s_store_id AS store_id,
         SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS sales,
         SUM(COALESCE(sr_return_amt, 0)) AS returns,
         SUM(ss_net_profit - COALESCE(sr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit
  FROM store_sales
  LEFT JOIN store_returns 
    ON (ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number)
  JOIN date_range 
    ON ss_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk
  JOIN store 
    ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
  JOIN filtered_items 
    ON ss_item_sk = filtered_items.i_item_sk
  JOIN promo 
    ON ss_promo_sk = promo.p_promo_sk
  WHERE ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60
  GROUP BY s_store_id
), csr AS (
  SELECT cp_catalog_page_id AS catalog_page_id,
         SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS sales,
         SUM(COALESCE(cr_return_amount, 0)) AS returns,
         SUM(cs_net_profit - COALESCE(cr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit
  FROM catalog_sales
  LEFT JOIN catalog_returns 
    ON (cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk AND cs_order_number = cr_order_number)
  JOIN date_range 
    ON cs_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk
  JOIN catalog_page 
    ON cs_catalog_page_sk = cp_catalog_page_sk
  JOIN filtered_items 
    ON cs_item_sk = filtered_items.i_item_sk
  JOIN promo 
    ON cs_promo_sk = promo.p_promo_sk
  WHERE cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60
  GROUP BY cp_catalog_page_id
), wsr AS (
  SELECT web_site_id,
         SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS sales,
         SUM(COALESCE(wr_return_amt, 0)) AS returns,
         SUM(ws_net_profit - COALESCE(wr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit
  FROM web_sales
  LEFT JOIN web_returns 
    ON (ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk AND ws_order_number = wr_order_number)
  JOIN date_range 
    ON ws_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk
  JOIN web_site 
    ON ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk
  JOIN filtered_items 
    ON ws_item_sk = filtered_items.i_item_sk
  JOIN promo 
    ON ws_promo_sk = promo.p_promo_sk
  WHERE ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60
  GROUP BY web_site_id
)
SELECT channel, id, SUM(sales) AS sales, SUM(returns) AS returns, SUM(profit) AS profit
FROM (
  SELECT 'store channel' AS channel, 'store' || store_id AS id, sales, returns, profit
  FROM ssr
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'catalog channel' AS channel, 'catalog_page' || catalog_page_id AS id, sales, returns, profit
  FROM csr
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'web channel' AS channel, 'web_site' || web_site_id AS id, sales, returns, profit
  FROM wsr
) x
GROUP BY ROLLUP (channel, id)
ORDER BY channel, id
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Created CTEs for commonly filtered tables (promotion, item, date_dim) to reduce redundant scans and improve efficiency
Converted implicit joins to explicit JOIN syntax to improve query readability and potentially allow the optimizer to choose better join orders

coalesce(wr_net_loss, 0)) as profit   from web_sales left outer join web_returns on          (ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk and ws_order_number = wr_order_number),      date_dim,      web_site,      item,      promotion  where ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk        and d_date between cast('1998-11-14' as date)                   and cast('1998-11-14' as date) + interval '30' day         and ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk        and ws_item_sk = i_item_sk        and i_current_price > 50        and ws_promo_sk = p_promo_sk        and p_channel_email = 'N'        and p_channel_tv = 'Y'        and p_channel_radio = 'Y'        and p_channel_press = 'N'        and p_channel_event = 'N'        and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 72        and i_category IN ('Books', 'Home') group by web_site_id)   select  channel         , id         , sum(sales) as sales         , sum(returns) as returns         , sum(profit) as profit  from  (select 'store channel' as channel         , 'store' || store_id as id         , sales         , returns         , profit  from   ssr  union all  select 'catalog channel' as channel         , 'catalog_page' || catalog_page_id as id         , sales         , returns         , profit  from  csr  union all  select 'web channel' as channel         , 'web_site' || web_site_id as id         , sales         , returns         , profit  from   wsr  ) x  group by rollup (channel, id)  order by channel          ,id  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_promotion AS (
  SELECT p_promo_sk
  FROM promotion
  WHERE p_channel_email = 'N'
    AND p_channel_tv = 'Y'
    AND p_channel_radio = 'Y'
    AND p_channel_press = 'N'
    AND p_channel_event = 'N'
),
filtered_date AS (
  SELECT d_date_sk
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_date BETWEEN CAST('1998-11-14' AS DATE)
                  AND CAST('1998-11-14' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '30' DAY
),
filtered_item AS (
  SELECT i_item_sk
  FROM item
  WHERE i_current_price > 50
    AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Home')
),
ssr AS (
  SELECT s_store_id AS store_id,
         SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS sales,
         SUM(COALESCE(sr_return_amt, 0)) AS returns,
         SUM(ss_net_profit - COALESCE(sr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit
  FROM store_sales
  LEFT OUTER JOIN store_returns ON (ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number)
  INNER JOIN filtered_date ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  INNER JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
  INNER JOIN filtered_item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
  INNER JOIN filtered_promotion ON ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
  WHERE ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 72
  GROUP BY s_store_id
),
csr AS (
  SELECT cp_catalog_page_id AS catalog_page_id,
         SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS sales,
         SUM(COALESCE(cr_return_amount, 0)) AS returns,
         SUM(cs_net_profit - COALESCE(cr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit
  FROM catalog_sales
  LEFT OUTER JOIN catalog_returns ON (cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk AND cs_order_number = cr_order_number)
  INNER JOIN filtered_date ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  INNER JOIN catalog_page ON cs_catalog_page_sk = cp_catalog_page_sk
  INNER JOIN filtered_item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
  INNER JOIN filtered_promotion ON cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
  WHERE cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 72
  GROUP BY cp_catalog_page_id
),
wsr AS (
  SELECT web_site_id,
         SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS sales,
         SUM(COALESCE(wr_return_amt, 0)) AS returns,
         SUM(ws_net_profit - COALESCE(wr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit
  FROM web_sales
  LEFT OUTER JOIN web_returns ON (ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk AND ws_order_number = wr_order_number)
  INNER JOIN filtered_date ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  INNER JOIN web_site ON ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk
  INNER JOIN filtered_item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
  INNER JOIN filtered_promotion ON ws_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
  WHERE ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 72
  GROUP BY web_site_id
)
SELECT channel,
       id,
       SUM(sales) AS sales,
       SUM(returns) AS returns,
       SUM(profit) AS profit
FROM (
  SELECT 'store channel' AS channel,
         'store' || store_id AS id,
         sales,
         returns,
         profit
  FROM ssr
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'catalog channel' AS channel,
         'catalog_page' || catalog_page_id AS id,
         sales,
         returns,
         profit
  FROM csr
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'web channel' AS channel,
         'web_site' || web_site_id AS id,
         sales,
         returns,
         profit
  FROM wsr
) x
GROUP BY ROLLUP (channel, id)
ORDER BY channel, id
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Created a filtered_promotion CTE to avoid scanning the promotion table multiple times with the same filtering conditions
Converted implicit comma joins to explicit INNER JOIN syntax with proper ON clauses for better readability and optimization

coalesce(cr_net_loss, 0)) as profit   from catalog_sales left outer join catalog_returns on          (cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk and cs_order_number = cr_order_number),      date_dim,      catalog_page,      item,      promotion  where cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk        and d_date between cast('1999-09-24' as date)                   and cast('1999-09-24' as date) + interval '30' day         and cs_catalog_page_sk = cp_catalog_page_sk        and cs_item_sk = i_item_sk        and i_current_price > 50        and cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk        and p_channel_email = 'N'        and p_channel_tv = 'N'        and p_channel_radio = 'Y'        and p_channel_press = 'N'        and p_channel_event = 'Y'        and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 33 AND 48        and i_category IN ('Home', 'Men') group by cp_catalog_page_id)  ,  wsr as  (select  web_site_id,           sum(ws_ext_sales_price) as sales,           sum(coalesce(wr_return_amt, 0)) as returns,           sum(ws_net_profit - coalesce(wr_net_loss, 0)) as profit   from web_sales left outer join web_returns on          (ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk and ws_order_number = wr_order_number),      date_dim,      web_site,      item,      promotion  where ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk        and d_date between cast('1999-09-24' as date)                   and cast('1999-09-24' as date) + interval '30' day         and ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk        and ws_item_sk = i_item_sk        and i_current_price > 50        and ws_promo_sk = p_promo_sk        and p_channel_email = 'N'        and p_channel_tv = 'N'        and p_channel_radio = 'Y'        and p_channel_press = 'N'        and p_channel_event = 'Y'        and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 33 AND 48        and i_category IN ('Home', 'Men') group by web_site_id)   select  channel         , id         , sum(sales) as sales         , sum(returns) as returns         , sum(profit) as profit  from  (select 'store channel' as channel         , 'store' || store_id as id         , sales         , returns         , profit  from   ssr  union all  select 'catalog channel' as channel         , 'catalog_page' || catalog_page_id as id         , sales         , returns         , profit  from  csr  union all  select 'web channel' as channel         , 'web_site' || web_site_id as id         , sales         , returns         , profit  from   wsr  ) x  group by rollup (channel, id)  order by channel          ,id  limit 100;

original_query: with customer_total_return as  (select cr_returning_customer_sk as ctr_customer_sk         ,ca_state as ctr_state,   	sum(cr_return_amt_inc_tax) as ctr_total_return  from catalog_returns      ,date_dim      ,customer_address  where cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk     and d_year =1998    and cr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk   group by cr_returning_customer_sk          ,ca_state )   select  c_customer_id,c_salutation,c_first_name,c_last_name,ca_street_number,ca_street_name                    ,ca_street_type,ca_suite_number,ca_city,ca_county,ca_state,ca_zip,ca_country,ca_gmt_offset                   ,ca_location_type,ctr_total_return  from customer_total_return ctr1      ,customer_address      ,customer  where ctr1.ctr_total_return > (select avg(ctr_total_return)*1.2  			  from customer_total_return ctr2                    	  where ctr1.ctr_state = ctr2.ctr_state)        and ca_address_sk = c_current_addr_sk        and ca_state = 'IL'        and ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk  order by c_customer_id,c_salutation,c_first_name,c_last_name,ca_street_number,ca_street_name                    ,ca_street_type,ca_suite_number,ca_city,ca_county,ca_state,ca_zip,ca_country,ca_gmt_offset                   ,ca_location_type,ctr_total_return  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
with customer_total_return as (
    select 
        cr_returning_customer_sk as ctr_customer_sk,
        ca_state as ctr_state,
        sum(cr_return_amt_inc_tax) as ctr_total_return
    from catalog_returns
    join date_dim on cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    join customer_address on cr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    where d_year = 1998
    group by cr_returning_customer_sk, ca_state
),
state_averages as (
    select 
        ctr_state,
        avg(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 as avg_120_percent
    from customer_total_return
    group by ctr_state
)
select 
    c_customer_id, c_salutation, c_first_name, c_last_name,
    ca_street_number, ca_street_name, ca_street_type, ca_suite_number,
    ca_city, ca_county, ca_state, ca_zip, ca_country, ca_gmt_offset,
    ca_location_type, ctr_total_return
from customer_total_return ctr1
join customer on ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
join customer_address on customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
join state_averages sa on ctr1.ctr_state = sa.ctr_state
where customer_address.ca_state = 'IL'
    and ctr1.ctr_total_return > sa.avg_120_percent
order by 
    c_customer_id, c_salutation, c_first_name, c_last_name,
    ca_street_number, ca_street_name, ca_street_type, ca_suite_number,
    ca_city, ca_county, ca_state, ca_zip, ca_country, ca_gmt_offset,
    ca_location_type, ctr_total_return
limit 100;

Replace comma joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and to ensure proper join conditions
Create a state_averages CTE to calculate the average return amount per state once, instead of recalculating it for each row

rewritten_query:
with customer_total_return as (
    select 
        cr_returning_customer_sk as ctr_customer_sk,
        ca_state as ctr_state,
        sum(cr_return_amt_inc_tax) as ctr_total_return,
        avg(sum(cr_return_amt_inc_tax)) over (partition by ca_state) * 1.2 as avg_state_return
    from catalog_returns
    join date_dim on cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    join customer_address on cr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    where d_year = 2001
    group by cr_returning_customer_sk, ca_state
)
select 
    c_customer_id, c_salutation, c_first_name, c_last_name,
    ca_street_number, ca_street_name, ca_street_type, ca_suite_number,
    ca_city, ca_county, ca_state, ca_zip, ca_country, ca_gmt_offset,
    ca_location_type, ctr_total_return
from customer_total_return ctr1
join customer on ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
join customer_address on ca_address_sk = c_current_addr_sk
where ca_state = 'OH'
    and ctr_total_return > avg_state_return
order by 
    c_customer_id, c_salutation, c_first_name, c_last_name,
    ca_street_number, ca_street_name, ca_street_type, ca_suite_number,
    ca_city, ca_county, ca_state, ca_zip, ca_country, ca_gmt_offset,
    ca_location_type, ctr_total_return
limit 100;

rewritten_query:
with customer_total_return as (
  select 
    cr_returning_customer_sk as ctr_customer_sk,
    ca_state as ctr_state,   	
    sum(cr_return_amt_inc_tax) as ctr_total_return
  from 
    catalog_returns,
    date_dim,
    customer_address
  where 
    cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    and d_year = 1998
    and cr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
  group by 
    cr_returning_customer_sk,
    ca_state
),
state_averages as (
  select 
    ctr_state, 
    avg(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 as avg_return_threshold
  from 
    customer_total_return
  group by 
    ctr_state
)
select  
  c_customer_id,
  c_salutation,
  c_first_name,
  c_last_name,
  ca_street_number,
  ca_street_name,
  ca_street_type,
  ca_suite_number,
  ca_city,
  ca_county,
  ca_state,
  ca_zip,
  ca_country,
  ca_gmt_offset,
  ca_location_type,
  ctr_total_return
from 
  customer_total_return ctr1
join 
  state_averages sa on ctr1.ctr_state = sa.ctr_state
join 
  customer on ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
join 
  customer_address on c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
where 
  ca_state = 'OR'
  and ctr1.ctr_total_return > sa.avg_return_threshold
order by 
  c_customer_id,
  c_salutation,
  c_first_name,
  c_last_name,
  ca_street_number,
  ca_street_name,
  ca_street_type,
  ca_suite_number,
  ca_city,
  ca_county,
  ca_state,
  ca_zip,
  ca_country,
  ca_gmt_offset,
  ca_location_type,
  ctr_total_return
limit 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Replace the correlated subquery in the WHERE clause with a second CTE and a join. The original query recalculates the average return amount for each state multiple times in the correlated subquery. By creating a state_averages CTE that pre-calculates this value once per state and then joining to it, we eliminate the expensive repeated calculations.
Improve query readability by using explicit JOIN syntax instead of comma-separated tables in the FROM clause, and by formatting the query with proper indentation.

	(select d_date 	from date_dim   where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 	  	  where d_date in ('1999-03-22','1999-05-27','1999-08-04','1999-11-10')))  and   cr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Women')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 3 and 12  and wr_return_amt / wr_return_quantity between 264 and 293  and wr_reason_sk in (3, 4, 26, 40, 52)  group by ,cr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 cr_dev        ,wr_item_qty        ,wr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 wr_dev sr_items.item_id          ,sr_item_qty  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_filter AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_date IN ('1999-03-22','1999-05-27','1999-08-04','1999-11-10')
), 
filtered_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk, i_item_id
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Women') 
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 3 AND 12
),
sr_items AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_id AS item_id,
        SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_item_qty
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN filtered_items ON sr_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_filter ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE sr_return_amt BETWEEN 264 * sr_return_quantity AND 293 * sr_return_quantity
        AND sr_reason_sk IN (3, 4, 26, 40, 52)
    GROUP BY i_item_id
), 
cr_items AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_id AS item_id,
        SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS cr_item_qty
    FROM catalog_returns
    JOIN filtered_items ON cr_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_filter ON cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE cr_return_amount BETWEEN 264 * cr_return_quantity AND 293 * cr_return_quantity
        AND cr_reason_sk IN (3, 4, 26, 40, 52)
    GROUP BY i_item_id
), 
wr_items AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_id AS item_id,
        SUM(wr_return_quantity) AS wr_item_qty
    FROM web_returns
    JOIN filtered_items ON wr_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_filter ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE wr_return_amt BETWEEN 264 * wr_return_quantity AND 293 * wr_return_quantity
        AND wr_reason_sk IN (3, 4, 26, 40, 52)
    GROUP BY i_item_id
)
SELECT 
    sr.item_id,
    sr.sr_item_qty,
    (sr.sr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0) * 100 AS sr_dev,
    cr.cr_item_qty,
    (cr.cr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0) * 100 AS cr_dev,
    wr.wr_item_qty,
    (wr.wr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0) * 100 AS wr_dev,
    (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 AS average
FROM sr_items sr
JOIN cr_items cr ON sr.item_id = cr.item_id
JOIN wr_items wr ON sr.item_id = wr.item_id
ORDER BY sr.item_id, sr.sr_item_qty
LIMIT 100;

in 	(select d_date 	from date_dim 	where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 	  where d_date in ('2002-02-09','2002-04-16','2002-07-16','2002-10-28')))  and   sr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Home', 'Jewelry')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 91 and 100  and sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity between 271 and 300  and sr_reason_sk in (3, 20, 40, 43, 51) group by i_item_id),  cr_items as  (select i_item_id item_id,         sum(cr_return_quantity) cr_item_qty  from catalog_returns,       item,       date_dim  where cr_item_sk = i_item_sk  and   d_date    in 	(select d_date 	from date_dim   where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 	  	  where d_date in ('2002-02-09','2002-04-16','2002-07-16','2002-10-28')))  and   cr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Home', 'Jewelry')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 91 and 100  and cr_return_amount / cr_return_quantity between 271 and 300  and cr_reason_sk in (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)  group by i_item_id),  wr_items as  (select i_item_id item_id,         sum(wr_return_quantity) wr_item_qty  from web_returns,       item,       date_dim  where wr_item_sk = i_item_sk  and   d_date    in 	(select d_date 	from date_dim   where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 			  where d_date in ('2002-02-09','2002-04-16','2002-07-16','2002-10-28')))  and   wr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Home', 'Jewelry')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 91 and 100  and wr_return_amt / wr_return_quantity between 271 and 300  and wr_reason_sk in (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)  group by i_item_id)   select  sr_items.item_id        ,sr_item_qty        ,sr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 sr_dev        ,cr_item_qty        ,cr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 cr_dev        ,wr_item_qty        ,wr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 wr_dev        ,(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 average  from sr_items      ,cr_items      ,wr_items  where sr_items.item_id=cr_items.item_id    and sr_items.item_id=wr_items.item_id  order by sr_items.item_id          ,sr_item_qty  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_seqs AS (
    SELECT d_month_seq
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_date IN ('2002-02-09','2002-04-16','2002-07-16','2002-10-28')
),
item_filtered AS (
    SELECT i_item_id, i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Home', 'Jewelry')
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 91 AND 100
),
sr_items AS (
    SELECT i.i_item_id AS item_id,
           SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_item_qty
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN item_filtered i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_month_seq IN (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_seqs)
      AND sr.sr_return_amt BETWEEN 271 * sr.sr_return_quantity AND 300 * sr.sr_return_quantity
      AND sr.sr_reason_sk IN (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)
    GROUP BY i.i_item_id
),
cr_items AS (
    SELECT i.i_item_id AS item_id,
           SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS cr_item_qty
    FROM catalog_returns cr
    JOIN item_filtered i ON cr.cr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON cr.cr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_month_seq IN (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_seqs)
      AND cr.cr_return_amount BETWEEN 271 * cr.cr_return_quantity AND 300 * cr.cr_return_quantity
      AND cr.cr_reason_sk IN (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)
    GROUP BY i.i_item_id
),
wr_items AS (
    SELECT i.i_item_id AS item_id,
           SUM(wr_return_quantity) AS wr_item_qty
    FROM web_returns wr
    JOIN item_filtered i ON wr.wr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON wr.wr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_month_seq IN (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_seqs)
      AND wr.wr_return_amt BETWEEN 271 * wr.wr_return_quantity AND 300 * wr.wr_return_quantity
      AND wr.wr_reason_sk IN (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)
    GROUP BY i.i_item_id
)
SELECT 
    sr.item_id,
    sr.sr_item_qty,
    sr.sr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 * 100 AS sr_dev,
    cr.cr_item_qty,
    cr.cr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 * 100 AS cr_dev,
    wr.wr_item_qty,
    wr.wr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 * 100 AS wr_dev,
    (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 AS average
FROM sr_items sr
JOIN cr_items cr ON sr.item_id = cr.item_id
JOIN wr_items wr ON sr.item_id = wr.item_id
ORDER BY sr.item_id, sr.sr_item_qty
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Simplified the nested subqueries for date filtering by creating a date_seqs CTE that extracts the month sequences once, then using d_month_seq IN (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_seqs) in each returns CTE.
Created an item_filtered CTE to pre-filter items by category and manager_id once, reducing redundant filtering in each returns CTE.

Replaced division operations (return_amt / return_quantity between 271 and 300) with multiplication (return_amt BETWEEN 271 * return_quantity AND 300 * return_quantity) to avoid expensive division operations.
Replaced comma-based joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and potentially better query optimization.

original_query: select  c_customer_id as customer_id        , coalesce(c_last_name,'') || ', ' || coalesce(c_first_name,'') as customername  from customer      ,customer_address      ,customer_demographics      ,household_demographics      ,income_band      ,store_returns  where ca_city	        =  'Hopewell'    and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk    and ib_lower_bound   >=  32287    and ib_upper_bound   <=  32287 + 50000    and ib_income_band_sk = hd_income_band_sk    and cd_demo_sk = c_current_cdemo_sk    and hd_demo_sk = c_current_hdemo_sk    and sr_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk  order by c_customer_id  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_address AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_city = 'Hopewell'
),
filtered_income AS (
    SELECT ib_income_band_sk
    FROM income_band
    WHERE ib_lower_bound >= 32287
      AND ib_upper_bound <= 82287
)
SELECT c_customer_id AS customer_id,
       COALESCE(c_last_name, '') || ', ' || COALESCE(c_first_name, '') AS customername
FROM customer c
JOIN filtered_address fa ON c.c_current_addr_sk = fa.ca_address_sk
JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
JOIN filtered_income fi ON hd.hd_income_band_sk = fi.ib_income_band_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
JOIN store_returns sr ON cd.cd_demo_sk = sr.sr_cdemo_sk
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id AS customer_id,
    COALESCE(c.c_last_name, '') || ', ' || COALESCE(c.c_first_name, '') AS customername
FROM 
    customer c
    JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON hd.hd_demo_sk = c.c_current_hdemo_sk
    JOIN income_band ib ON ib.ib_income_band_sk = hd.hd_income_band_sk
    JOIN store_returns sr ON sr.sr_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_city = 'Pleasant Hill'
    AND ib.ib_lower_bound >= 35577
    AND ib.ib_upper_bound <= 85577
ORDER BY 
    c.c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

       MIN(sr_ticket_number),

JOIN store_returns ON sr_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
WHERE ca_city = 'Hopewell';

d_date_sk and d_year = 1999    and cd1.cd_demo_sk = wr_refunded_cdemo_sk    and cd2.cd_demo_sk = wr_returning_cdemo_sk    and ca_address_sk = wr_refunded_addr_sk    and r_reason_sk = wr_reason_sk    and    (     (      cd1.cd_marital_status = 'U'      and      cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status      and      cd1.cd_education_status = 'Primary'      and      cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status      and      ws_sales_price between 100.00 and 150.00     )    or     (      cd1.cd_marital_status = 'D'      and      cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status      and      cd1.cd_education_status = '4 yr Degree'      and      cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status      and      ws_sales_price between 50.00 and 100.00     )    or     (      cd1.cd_marital_status = 'M'      and      cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status      and      cd1.cd_education_status = 'College'      and      cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status      and      ws_sales_price between 150.00 and 200.00     )    )    and    (     (      ca_country = 'United States'      and      ca_state in ('NE', 'TN', 'TX')      and ws_net_profit between 100 and 200     )     or     (      ca_country = 'United States'      and      ca_state in ('MS', 'NY', 'VA')      and ws_net_profit between 150 and 300     )     or     (      ca_country = 'United States'      and      ca_state in ('MS', 'TN', 'TX')      and ws_net_profit between 50 and 250     )    ) group by r_reason_desc order by substring(r_reason_desc,1,20)         ,avg(ws_quantity)         ,avg(wr_refunded_cash)         ,avg(wr_fee) limit 100;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    SUBSTRING(r_reason_desc, 1, 20),
    AVG(ws_quantity),
    AVG(wr_refunded_cash),
    AVG(wr_fee)
FROM 
    web_sales
JOIN 
    web_returns ON ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk AND ws_order_number = wr_order_number
JOIN 
    web_page ON ws_web_page_sk = wp_web_page_sk
JOIN 
    customer_demographics cd1 ON cd1.cd_demo_sk = wr_refunded_cdemo_sk
JOIN 
    customer_demographics cd2 ON cd2.cd_demo_sk = wr_returning_cdemo_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON ca_address_sk = wr_refunded_addr_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN 
    reason ON r_reason_sk = wr_reason_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 1999
    AND (
        (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'U' AND cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status AND cd1.cd_education_status = 'Primary' AND cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status AND ws_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00)
        OR
        (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'D' AND cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status AND cd1.cd_education_status = '4 yr Degree' AND cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status AND ws_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00)
        OR
        (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'M' AND cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status AND cd1.cd_education_status = 'College' AND cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status AND ws_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00)
    )
    AND (
        (ca_country = 'United States' AND ca_state IN ('NE', 'TN', 'TX') AND ws_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200)
        OR
        (ca_country = 'United States' AND ca_state IN ('MS', 'NY', 'VA') AND ws_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300)
        OR
        (ca_country = 'United States' AND ca_state IN ('MS', 'TN', 'TX') AND ws_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250)
    )
GROUP BY 
    r_reason_desc
ORDER BY 
    SUBSTRING(r_reason_desc, 1, 20),
    AVG(ws_quantity),
    AVG(wr_refunded_cash),
    AVG(wr_fee)
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select min(ws_quantity)        ,min(wr_refunded_cash)        ,min(wr_fee)        ,min(ws_item_sk)        ,min(wr_order_number)        ,min(cd1.cd_demo_sk) 	   ,min(cd2.cd_demo_sk)  from web_sales, web_returns, web_page, customer_demographics cd1,       customer_demographics cd2, customer_address, date_dim, reason  where ws_web_page_sk = wp_web_page_sk    and ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk    and ws_order_number = wr_order_number    and ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_year = 1998    and cd1.cd_demo_sk = wr_refunded_cdemo_sk    and cd2.cd_demo_sk = wr_returning_cdemo_sk    and ca_address_sk = wr_refunded_addr_sk    and r_reason_sk = wr_reason_sk    and    (     (      cd1.cd_marital_status = 'W'      and      cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status      and      cd1.cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree'      and      cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status      and      ws_sales_price between 100.00 and 150.00     )    or     (      cd1.cd_marital_status = 'S'      and      cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status      and      cd1.cd_education_status = 'College'      and      cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status      and      ws_sales_price between 50.00 and 100.00     )    or     (      cd1.cd_marital_status = 'D'      and      cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status      and      cd1.cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree'      and      cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status      and      ws_sales_price between 150.00 and 200.00     )    )    and    (     (      ca_country = 'United States'      and      ca_state in ('GA', 'IN', 'VA')      and ws_net_profit between 100 and 200     )     or     (      ca_country = 'United States'      and      ca_state in ('MT', 'NM', 'OR')      and ws_net_profit between 150 and 300     )     or     (      ca_country = 'United States'      and      ca_state in ('GA', 'IL', 'OH')      and ws_net_profit between 50 and 250     )    )  ;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1998
),
filtered_cd1 AS (
    SELECT cd_demo_sk, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status
    FROM customer_demographics
    WHERE (cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree')
       OR (cd_marital_status = 'S' AND cd_education_status = 'College')
       OR (cd_marital_status = 'D' AND cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree')
),
filtered_address AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_state
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_country = 'United States'
    AND (ca_state IN ('GA', 'IN', 'VA') 
      OR ca_state IN ('MT', 'NM', 'OR')
      OR ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'OH'))
)
SELECT 
    MIN(ws_quantity),
    MIN(wr_refunded_cash),
    MIN(wr_fee),
    MIN(ws_item_sk),
    MIN(wr_order_number),
    MIN(cd1.cd_demo_sk),
    MIN(cd2.cd_demo_sk)
FROM web_returns wr
JOIN filtered_cd1 cd1 ON wr.wr_refunded_cdemo_sk = cd1.cd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd2 ON wr.wr_returning_cdemo_sk = cd2.cd_demo_sk
    AND cd2.cd_marital_status = cd1.cd_marital_status
    AND cd2.cd_education_status = cd1.cd_education_status
JOIN filtered_address ca ON ca.ca_address_sk = wr.wr_refunded_addr_sk
JOIN web_sales ws ON ws.ws_item_sk = wr.wr_item_sk 
    AND ws.ws_order_number = wr.wr_order_number
JOIN filtered_dates d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN web_page wp ON ws.ws_web_page_sk = wp.wp_web_page_sk
JOIN reason r ON wr.wr_reason_sk = r.r_reason_sk
WHERE ((cd1.cd_marital_status = 'W' AND ws_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00)
    OR (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'S' AND ws_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00)
    OR (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'D' AND ws_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00))
AND ((ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IN', 'VA') AND ws_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200)
    OR (ca.ca_state IN ('MT', 'NM', 'OR') AND ws_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300)
    OR (ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'OH') AND ws_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250));
